summary: Frontend implements routing, landing page, course browsing, course detail, lesson viewer, My Learning dashboard, and Internet Identity-based auth UI with a warm (non-blue/purple) theme. Backend adds a Motoko actor with course/lesson/user-progress types and some course APIs plus an admin-gated init seeding function. Several backend acceptance-criteria items (stable upgrade persistence, automatic seeding, and full API surface) are not evidenced in the provided diff summary; image asset files are also not evidenced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data persists across canister upgrades using stable storage patterns appropriate for a single-actor Motoko canister
missing_requirements.reason: The added backend actor shows in-memory `var`/`Map` state, but the diff summary does not show any `stable` variables or `preupgrade`/`postupgrade` logic to persist/restore state across upgrades.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes methods to mark a lesson completed and fetch current user progress (and other required APIs)
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary explicitly shows `browseCourses`, `getCourse`, and the start of `enrollInCourse`, but does not show (within the visible content) `completeLesson`, `getUserProgress`, or `getCourseProgress`. Frontend hooks call these methods, but their backend implementations are not evidenced in the provided truncated backend file excerpt.

missing_requirements.requirement: Seed the app with a small default course catalog (at least 2 courses, each with at least 5 lessons) without requiring admin tools
missing_requirements.reason: Seeding is implemented via a `public shared ({ caller }) func init()` that is admin-gated and therefore not guaranteed to exist by default after deployment. Also, the visible portion seeds 2 courses but only shows 3 lessons added (not 5 per course). More seeding may exist in truncated content, but it is not evidenced in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated with filenames shikho-logo.dim_512x512.png and shikho-hero.dim_1600x900.png
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend code references these files, but the diff summary does not show the actual image files under `frontend/public/assets/generated` (some added files are omitted due to limits). Therefore existence is not evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin access-control framework and secret-token initialization flow (e.g., `_initializeAccessControlWithSecret`, `caffeineAdminToken`, admin-gated `init` for seeding)
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not ask for an admin/authorization system beyond Internet Identity authentication for users, nor a secret admin token URL parameter mechanism.
The BuildRequest does not request external promotional links or 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution in the UI.
